title: Buddhist Calendar 2026
description: Welcome to the 2026 Buddhist calendar. Events update from RDroidApps servers.

title: New Year — Mindfulness
description: Begin the year with metta and five minutes of quiet breathing. (Gregorian 2026)

title: Magha Puja (observance)
description: Commemoration of the Buddha's teaching to 1,250 arahants. Many communities hold candle processions. (Gregorian 2026)

title: Thai Poya — Full Moon
description: Uposatha day for renewal of precepts and temple visits in Thai tradition. (Gregorian 2026)
